title: Student Management System
description: A Java and MySQL student data management system built with layered architecture, input-validated CRUD, and custom SQL reporting.

title: SpringMart
description: Spring Boot e-commerce REST API featuring database-backed search, pagination, and Docker deployment, paired with a React frontend.

title: wrkout
description: Next.js and Supabase workout tracker optimized for Push/Pull/Legs splits, featuring progress tracking and interactive training logs.

title: Shreyan's Arc
description: Interactive DSA roadmap with Firebase sync that filters massive question banks into core problem-solving patterns in a structured sequence.

title: J-Void
description: Java-based playground for distraction-free DSA practice. Integrates with the Shreyan's Arc roadmap and provides direct LeetCode submission links.

title: WealthWise
description: Financial advisor website featuring interactive planning calculators (SIP, Retirement, and more) to engage prospects and showcase advisory services.
